description: Lock the Earth system model rescope and prevent TIROS-era satellite forecasting from depending on later coupled Earth-system models.

checks.reason: Earth system models are anchored to NCAR's mid-1990s coupled-model lineage, not the earlier general climate-modeling placeholder.
The current satellite forecasting node is scoped to TIROS-era 1960 satellite observations and should not require later coupled Earth-system models.
Weather satellites remain the direct technology enabler for the TIROS-era forecasting scope.
Satellite remote sensing remains the broader observation capability behind weather-satellite forecasting.
